bird.summary: The stripe-breasted rhabdornis (Rhabdornis inornatus), also known as the stripe-breasted creeper or plain-headed creeper, is a species of b…

locations.name: 莱特岛
locations.summary: 雷伊泰島（Leyte）是菲律賓群島中的米沙鄢群島的島嶼之一。面積7213平方公里。北臨薩馬海；東北隔聖華尼科海峽與薩馬島相望，兩島有跨海大橋相連；南面為棉蘭老海，與棉蘭老島相望；西南為保和島；西為宿霧島；西北為馬斯巴特島。 第二次世界大戰…

locations.name: 阿波火山
locations.summary: 阿波火山（他加祿語：Bundok Apo）是一座位于菲律宾棉兰老岛东南部的活火山，海拔2,954公尺，为菲律宾最高峰。达沃市位于其东北方30公里处。近百年未喷发，有硫磺矿，覆盖着热带硬木林。 主峰及周围已经开辟为阿波火山国家公园（面积80…

locations.name: Kitanglad Mountain Range
locations.summary: The Kitanglad Mountain Range dominates the northern central portion of the province of Bukidnon, Philippines.

relations.subject: Stripe-breasted rhabdornis
relations.evidence: It is typically found in tropical montane and submontane forest but has been found as low as 230 masl in Leyte

relations.subject: Stripe-breasted rhabdornis
relations.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Mount Apo and Kitanglad Mountain Range but like all areas in the Philippines protection is lax
